|dissolved=By [[35 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' states that the Lumini pirates became defunct before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']]. The reference book dates the events of the film to one [[Standard year|year]] after the [[Hosnian Cataclysm]], which ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]'' dates to [[34 ABY]]. As such, the events of ''The Rise of Skywalker'' must take place in [[35 ABY]], and the Lumini pirates must have dissolved some point prior to that year.</ref>
|restored=
|affiliation=
}}
The '''Lumini pirates''' were a [[pirate]] organization.<ref name="TROS VD" /> By [[35 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the organization had become defunct, having been attacked by the [[First Order]]. [[Kuimi Enissa]], a young [[Lieutenant (criminal)|lieutenant]] in the organization, was the sole survivor of the attack.<ref name="TROS VD" />
